In burn_mamba::mamba2::cache

burn_mamba::mamba2::cache

Struct Mamba2Caches 

Source 
pub struct Mamba2Caches<B: Backend> {
    pub caches: Vec<Mamba2Cache<B>>,
}
Expand description

A collection of per-layer caches for a complete Mamba-2 network.

During autoregressive decoding, a Mamba2Caches instance is threaded through every call to [crate::layer::Mamba2Layers::step]. Each element of caches corresponds to one (virtual) layer in the network.

Fields§

§caches: Vec<Mamba2Cache<B>>

Per-layer caches.

Length: n_real_caches (the number of virtual layers, which may exceed the number of real weight layers when weight-sharing / layer scheduling is in use).
